overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city district at night. The player character navigates wet sidewalks, crosses intersections with passing vehicles, and walks beneath elevated highways while surrounded by holographic advertisements, Japanese-inspired signage, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with Japanese signage

events.description: green sports car drives past on the wet street
pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching an intersection, observing neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past on the wet asphalt

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Malley Place' mounted on the right sidewalk wall
large circular neon sign with Japanese text and ramen bowl imagery
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
towering cyberpunk skyscrapers with illuminated windows and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked sidewalk in a cyberpunk city district, with the 'Malley Place' sign visible on the right. The camera moves forward past a circular neon ramen sign, approaching an intersection. A green sports car drives by on the wet street, and a pedestrian passes in the opposite direction. The atmosphere is thick with neon light reflecting off the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the wide intersection
large commercial truck passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating between passing vehicles while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: painted yellow zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt surface
large digital advertisement screens displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide crosswalk, entering the open intersection. Yellow zebra stripes mark the crossing on the wet asphalt. A large commercial truck passes by on the right as the camera continues across. The futuristic skyline remains visible ahead, while the ramen sign and Malley Place sign fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with graffiti walls

events.description: turns left onto sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass
continues walking straight under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered walls and metal railings

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with thick support columns
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street below
tall towers covered in vertical holographic advertisements glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: Turning left, the camera moves onto a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The space is semi-covered and sheltered from the rain, with a graffiti-covered wall on the left and a metal guardrail on the right. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating a quiet, enclosed atmosphere under the concrete structure. Distant holographic towers glow through the haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with mixed traditional and neon architecture

events.description: approaches crosswalk at the end of the overpass section
begins crossing the street alongside other pedestrians
starts following a pedestrian wearing distinctive yellow pants

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection and following a pedestrian in yellow pants into a narrower street lined with traditional and modern buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants walking ahead, leading the way down the street

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging from building facade
bright red neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on building exterior
opening to a narrower street lined with mixed traditional and cyberpunk architecture

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass area, the camera approaches a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes. Traditional red paper lanterns hang on the left while a red neon 'HOTEL' sign glows on the right. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, then follows a person in distinctive yellow pants into a narrower street. The holographic towers are now closer, dominating the center of the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a vibrant neon-lit sidewalk into the sheltered shadows of an overpass before emerging into a dense commercial alley. It begins by gliding past a circular ramen sign and the Malley Place marker, where neon lights reflect off the wet pavement as a green sports car streaks by. As the camera transitions onto a wide crosswalk, it crosses the yellow zebra stripes of a busy intersection while a large commercial truck passes on the right. The scene then shifts into a quieter, enclosed atmosphere beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, moving along a graffiti-covered wall toward distant, glowing holographic towers. Finally, the camera exits the shelter to cross another street adorned with red paper lanterns and a glowing hotel sign, following a pedestrian in yellow pants into a narrow street dominated by towering holograms.
